title: Hallmark Hall of Fame
overview: Long-running anthology program sponsored by Hallmark Cards. Beginning in 1951 and continuing into 2019, the series received 80 Emmy Awards, 24 Christopher Awards, 11 Peabody Awards, 9 Golden Globes, and 4 Humanitas Prizes. Early seasons were a weekly live drama, eventually transitioning to videotaped and then filmed productions broadcast as occasional specials.

episodes.title: The Lark
episodes.overview: Adaptation of the Anouilh play, as adapted for Broadway by Lillian Hellmann.
